glosses.ja: 壊れやすい; 敏感な

translations.es: Hoy es una situación delicada para mí.
translations.de: Das ist heute heikel für mich.
translations.it: Oggi per me è una situazione delicata.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天对我来说有点棘手。
translations.yue: 今日對我嚟講有啲棘手。
translations.ru: Сегодня для меня это щекотливая ситуация.
translations.pt: Hoje é uma situação delicada para mim.
translations.tr: Bugün benim için hassas bir durum.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chuyện này tế nhị với tôi.
translations.nl: Vandaag is het voor mij een gevoelige situatie.
translations.uk: Сьогодні для мене це делікатна ситуація.
translations.hi: आज यह मेरे लिए एक नाज़ुक स्थिति है.
translations.pl: Dziś to dla mnie delikatna sprawa.
translations.el: Σήμερα είναι μια ευαίσθητη κατάσταση για μένα.
translations.nb: Dette er en delikat situasjon for meg i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini situasi ini sensitif bagi saya.
translations.sv: Det är känsligt för mig idag.
translations.ro: Astăzi este o situație delicată pentru mine.
translations.cs: Dnes je to pro mě citlivá záležitost.
translations.da: Det er følsomt for mig i dag.
translations.fi: Tämä on minulle tänään herkkä tilanne.
translations.ja: 今日は私にとって微妙な状況です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun with elision before a vowel; impersonal subject of the copular clause.
3rd person singular present of 'être'; copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; characterizes the situation introduced by impersonal 'ce'.
Preposition introducing the beneficiary/perspective.
Stressed 1st-person singular pronoun functioning as the object of the preposition 'pour'.
Temporal adverb specifying when; modifies the clause.

sentences.target: Ma peau est délicate en hiver.

translations.fr: Ma peau est délicate en hiver.
translations.en: My skin is delicate in winter.
translations.es: Mi piel es sensible en invierno.
translations.de: Meine Haut ist im Winter empfindlich.
translations.it: La mia pelle è delicata in inverno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的皮肤在冬天很敏感。
translations.pt: Minha pele fica sensível no inverno.
translations.vi: Da tôi nhạy cảm vào mùa đông.
translations.nl: Mijn huid is gevoelig in de winter.
translations.hi: सर्दियों में मेरी त्वचा संवेदनशील रहती है.
translations.el: Το δέρμα μου είναι ευαίσθητο τον χειμώνα.
translations.nb: Huden min er sensitiv om vinteren.
translations.id: Kulit saya sensitif saat musim dingin.
translations.sv: Min hud είναι känslig på vintern.
translations.cs: Má pleť je v zimě citlivá.
translations.da: Min hud er sart om vinteren.
translations.ja: 私の肌は冬に敏感です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, feminine singular; agrees with 'peau'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the copular verb.
3rd person singular present of 'être'; copula linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; agrees with 'peau'.
Preposition marking a time period.
Common noun serving as a temporal complement to 'en'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'tissu'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the copular verb.
3rd person singular present of 'être'; copula linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective, masculine singular; agrees with 'tissu'.

sentences.target: Le parfum est délicat mais très agréable.
sentences.reading: /lə paʁfœ̃ ɛ delika mɛ tʁɛz aɡʁeabl/

translations.fr: Le parfum est délicat mais très agréable.
translations.ipa: /lə paʁfœ̃ ɛ delika mɛ tʁɛz aɡʁeabl/
translations.en: The perfume is delicate but very pleasant.
translations.es: El perfume es delicado pero muy agradable.
translations.de: Der Duft ist zart, aber sehr angenehm.
translations.it: Il profumo è delicato ma molto piacevole.
translations.zh-Hans: 这款香味很淡雅但非常宜人。
translations.yue: 呢款香味好淡雅但好好聞。
translations.pt: O perfume é delicado, mas muito agradável.
translations.vi: Hương thơm tinh tế nhưng rất dễ chịu.
translations.nl: Het parfum είναι subtiel maar heel aangenaam.
translations.hu: Az illat finom, de nagyon kellemes.
translations.hi: खुशबू नाज़ुक लेकिन बहुत सुखद है.
translations.pl: Zapach jest delikatny, ale bardzo przyjemny.
translations.el: Το άρωμα είναι λεπτό αλλά πολύ ευχάριστο.
translations.nb: Duften είναι delikat, men veldig behagelig.
translations.sv: Doften är subtil men väldigt behaglig.
translations.ro: Parfumul είναι delicat, dar foarte plăcut.
translations.cs: Vůně είναι jemná, ale velmi příjemná.
translations.da: Duften είναι delikat, men meget behagelig.
translations.fi: Tuoksu είναι hienovarainen mutta erittäin miellyttävä.
translations.ja: 香りは繊細ですがとても心地よいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'parfum'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the copular verb.
3rd person singular present of 'être'; copula linking subject and predicate.
Predicate adjective describing 'parfum'.
Coordinating conjunction introducing contrast; links two predicate-level descriptors.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'agréable'.
Adjective used predicatively; the second coordinated predicate, modified by 'très'.
